text_block_list.text:
The day of the Fan Fest has arrived, and Mihono
Bourbon is participating in a certain contest.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I will be in the Poker Face Championship.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. It's a competition to see how well
entrants can keep a straight face while
experiencing "fear" or "shock."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I was selected to represent my class in the
competition.

She has a poker face by default. On the outside,
she's expressionless to the point that people think
she's a robot.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
All students from the winning class will receive a
ticket for a free carrot parfait.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Eating parfaits with my classmates will help to
deepen my bonds with them... I cannot fail.
She looks even more serious than usual.

All the contestants from the academy gather and
the competition begins.

text_block_list.name: Championship Organizer
text_block_list.text: Who will take home victory?! Let's find out!

text_block_list.name: Championship Organizer
text_block_list.text:
Round one is the haunted house! If you can make
it through while maintaining your poker face, you
pass!

text_block_list.name: Participating Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Gyaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
All light sources are blocked off. Visibility is poor.
Caution required.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Sensors indicate staff approaching from straight
ahead. I have to greet them.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume in Ghost Costume
text_block_list.text: Oooooh... I will haaave my reveeenge...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Understood. Please watch your step as you do.

Round one seems pretty difficult for the average
contestant...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: No way! I can't do this!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: How many times did I tell you that?!

text_block_list.name: Championship Organizer
text_block_list.text:
Must be seriously spooky inside because our
contestants are dropping out one after another!
Fewer than half remain!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Ummm, did I make it?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Mission complete.

text_block_list.name: Championship Organizer
text_block_list.text: Let's keep it moving! Next up is...

text_block_list.name: Championship Organizer
text_block_list.text:
Round two—super-spicy ramen! If you can eat the
whole bowl while keeping a straight face, you
pass!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Detecting high levels of spice in system.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I need... water...
A lot of people drop out in this round too.

text_block_list.name: Championship Organizer
text_block_list.text:
What a shocker, folks! As we move into the final
round, all we have left are...

text_block_list.name: Championship Organizer
text_block_list.text: Two contestants!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Victory is within sight.

text_block_list.name: Expressionless Umamusume
text_block_list.text: I won't lose.

text_block_list.name: Championship Organizer
text_block_list.text:
Now then, time for round three, in which our
contestants will confess their feelings to someone
important to them!

text_block_list.name: Championship Organizer
text_block_list.text:
If they can confess while maintaining their poker
face, then they pass! You're up, Bourbon!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Someone special... In other words you, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Well... You're always devoted to helping me train
at my best.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
You wake up early, retire late, and do everything
in your power to help us win.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I feel very supported because of your
dependability and warmth.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
It is quite difficult to express with words, but I am
very gratef—
Suddenly, a gust of wind kicks up some dust.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Achoo!

text_block_list.name: Championship Organizer
text_block_list.text: Mihono Bourbon has been eliminateeeeed!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Ngh... Our parfaits!

Bourbon wasn't able to win the competition, but
it was still a rather heartwarming experience.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Well... You're always devoted to helping me train
at my best.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
You wake up early, retire late, and do everything
in your power to help us win.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I feel very supported because of your
dependability and warmth.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
It is quite difficult to express with words, but I am
very grateful for you, Trainer. Thank you.

Mihono Bourbon is, without a doubt, incredibly
important to me. I feel like I can achieve anything
with her by my side.

I forget all about the contest happening around
us and express my gratitude to her as best I can.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Championship Organizer
text_block_list.text:
Wait, look at Mihono Bourbon's tail! It's swishing
enthusiastically!

text_block_list.name: Championship Organizer
text_block_list.text:
She can't hide her joy! Does this count as grounds
for elimination? What will the judges say?

text_block_list.name: Championship Organizer
text_block_list.text: Nope, she's safe! Her face is still totally blank!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I did it.

The other contestant gets visibly embarrassed
while expressing her gratitude to her trainer.

text_block_list.name: Championship Organizer
text_block_list.text: The winner is Mihono Bourbooooon!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I won!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Now, all of my classmates and I can enjoy carrot
parfaits together.

I can't help but smile at seeing Mihono Bourbon
this uncharacteristically happy.
